examples: First of all, it is omnidirectional.
A good omnidirectional microphone is a must.
The Omnidirectional RWR is an important airborne ECM equipment.
Each speaker features an omnidirectional diffuser that channels music in all directions creating 360 degrees of immersive sound.
The video below shows Team Fortress 2 running on an Oculus Rift with the added use of an omnidirectional treadmill.
